creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text:
A bug supposedly reported years ago is still unfixed in FreeBSD according to this post from a few hours ago:

https://www.reddit.com/r/BSD/comments/c4krwr/freebsd_ipv6_remote_dingdong_attack_kernel_panic/?ref=share&ref_source=link archived at: https://web.archive.org/web/20190624115041/https://www.reddit.com/r/BSD/comments/c4krwr/freebsd_ipv6_remote_dingdong_attack_kernel_panic/?ref=share&ref_source=link.
